patterns.name: Phase wrapping
patterns.rule: Always .rem_euclid(TAU) after phase arithmetic

patterns.name: Error propagation
patterns.rule: ? operator with OracError, never panic

patterns.name: Fire-and-forget bridge
patterns.rule: Raw TCP HTTP, tokio::spawn, no blocking

patterns.name: Feature gates
patterns.rule: #[cfg(feature)] for evolution, monitoring, intelligence

patterns.name: Borrow extraction
patterns.rule: Extract values before cross-field mutations

patterns.name: NaN guard
patterns.rule: is_finite() check on all phase/frequency updates

patterns.name: Saturating arithmetic
patterns.rule: saturating_mul/add for counters to prevent overflow

patterns.name: Frequency clamp
patterns.rule: Clamp to [0.001, 10.0] on all frequency updates

patterns.name: Amortised prune
patterns.rule: Batch prune at threshold+50, not every tick

patterns.name: VecDeque for logs
patterns.rule: VecDeque with cap, not Vec for message/event logs

patterns.name: Chars not bytes
patterns.rule: chars().take(N) for string truncation, not byte slicing

patterns.name: SIGTERM handler
patterns.rule: tokio::signal::unix for graceful shutdown with timeout

patterns.name: WAL mode
patterns.rule: PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL on all SQLite connections

patterns.name: Hook sub-ms response
patterns.rule: Hook endpoints must respond in <1ms — local memory only, no external calls in hot path

patterns.name: Permission policy cascade
patterns.rule: Check sphere-specific → fleet-wide → default policy, in that order

patterns.name: Hook idempotency
patterns.rule: Hook handlers must be idempotent — same hook_id processed twice = same result

patterns.name: IPC reconnect backoff
patterns.rule: Exponential backoff 100ms→5s on PV2 socket reconnect, not tight loop

patterns.name: Thermal gate passthrough
patterns.rule: PreToolUse thermal gate returns 'approve' if SYNTHEX bridge is down — fail open, not closed

patterns.name: Bridge staleness bitfield
patterns.rule: BridgeStaleness uses u8 bitfield, not 6-bool struct (gold standard refactor)

patterns.name: Multi-parameter mutation
patterns.rule: Evolution chamber MUST use diversity-enforced selection: round-robin, 10-gen cooldown, 50% diversity cap

patterns.name: Consent gate stub
patterns.rule: Every bridge module includes _consent_check() stub for future active consent (NA-P-1)

patterns.name: Ring file cap
patterns.rule: WASM ring file capped at 1000 lines — truncate from head when exceeded
